Gonorrhea Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a gonorrhea test? 
A gonorrhea test looks for signs of a gonorrhea Â  bacterial infection in a sample of your urine (pee) or saliva. Gonorrhea is one of the most common sexually transmitted infections Â (STIs). Anyone can get gonorrhea if they have vaginal, oral, or anal sex with someone who has the infection.
The bacteria often infect the genitals, but it can infect the rectum, throat
